mnemonics.title: Linked List Types
mnemonics.content: SiDoCi: Singly, Doubly, Circular - the three main types of linked lists.

mnemonics.title: Node Structure
mnemonics.content: DaLi: Data + Link - every node has a data field and a link (pointer) to the next node.

mnemonics.title: Array vs Linked List
mnemonics.content: Array = Contiguous Fixed Random-access. Linked List = Dynamic Scattered Sequential-access.

mnemonics.title: Linked List Advantages
mnemonics.content: DINE: Dynamic size, Insertion efficient, No memory waste, Easy deletion.
